title: Bullets & Bolts
description:
Guns, magic, and technology coming together in a neatly wrapped package. 

Wander, discover, and conquer with a wide arsenal of weaponry to support you on an overhauled and detailed path of progression!
body:
![bannerahhh](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96d77ccc6e85b7bd98066749f5951c622adf61c0.png)

**Experience the Unfold's Third Edition as you Embark on a long quest filled with guns, wizards, technology...and blackholes.**

This is a fun modpack with a variety of mods that don't make the player *too* OP, perfect for having fun with friends! Centered around a chaotic path focused on overhauled progression, with a questline designed to guide you through all the changes!
________________________________________________________________________________________________
![quests](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06e930b48222830a76668c993a5bc3813df80cd2.png)

**Experience a guided, overhauled experience, with our in-depth, customized Quest Trees to help you along the way!**

We have a massive focus on progression, and have overhaulted the game to the point of deleting a lot of vanilla minecraft progression points and replacing them with modded ones to give you a totally refreshing experience free from the flaws of bland vanilla progression!

# Note: 
**We recommend allocating at least 8gb of ram**
